description: A major customer's annual supply contract is due for renewal next month.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's existing contract to review the terms and pricing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the current contract from the document repository.

nodes.task_description: Generate a new draft contract for the upcoming year, applying a standard annual price increase.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a draft of the new contract with updated pricing.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft contract to the customer for their review and signature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent emails the new contract to the customer's procurement contact.
